mapper.insert: INSERT INTO store( user_id, store_name, business_number, location, store_pic, store_tel, store_info) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{storeName}, #{businessNumber}, #{address}, #{storePic}, #{tel}, #{storeInfo} )
mapper.update: UPDATE store SET store_name = #{storeName}, location = #{location}, store_tel = #{storeTel}, business_number = #{businessNumber}, store_pic = #{storePic}, store_info = #{storeInfo}, WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
UPDATE store SET business_hours = #{businessHours}, holiday = #{holiday}, notice = #{notice}, min_price = #{minPrice}, status = #{status} WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
